query:
SELECT id, title, difficulty::text as "difficulty!"
            FROM learning_paths
            WHERE status = 'published'
            AND (
                title ILIKE $1
                OR description ILIKE $1
            )
            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM learning_path_progress lpp
                WHERE lpp.learning_path_id = learning_paths.id
                AND lpp.user_id = $2
            )
            LIMIT 2
